gate.reason: ML beats Elo-only on Brier (0.50847 < 0.52903) and NLL (0.86663 < 0.89954) on held-out 3580 matches.
gate.rule: ML must beat Elo-only on BOTH held-out Brier and NLL

honest_notes: Elo-only baseline uses the SAME pre-match elo_diff feature -> fair test of learned vs hand-set mapping.
Features are intentionally lean (elo_diff, neutral) to avoid overfitting.
Test set is strictly after train -> no temporal leakage.
This validates a single-match 1X2 model, NOT the tournament Monte Carlo directly.
